# third_party

## Purpose

Placeholder for future third-party dependency notes.

## What belongs here

License notes, vendoring policy, or small approved third-party files if a later stage allows them.

## What does not belong here

Unreviewed vendored code, downloaded archives, installers, or large generated files.

## Codex modification policy

Codex may edit documentation. Do not vendor dependencies in Stage 0A.

## Stage 0A restrictions

No third-party C++ dependencies are added.
